creator: martti.kuparinen@nomadiclab.com
text:
There are some nice xpm files at the fvwm web site. I have created a
new port for the icons as I didn't know how to easily integrate them
into x11-wm/fvwm2. If there's a better approach for this, please
use it instead of my "use-a-separate-port-hack" :-)

Howto:
- Fix the fvwm2 port to install the icons
- Create the new fvwm2-icons port
